hero.title: Ofer's Atelier
hero.subtitle: Fire, Smoke & Culinary Craftsmanship in Chiang Mai
hero.description: A premium chef-led atelier where guests gather around fire, smoke, and handcrafted food experiences.

introBand.heading: A Chiang Mai culinary atelier shaped by smoke, flame, and human connection.
introBand.body: Ofer's Atelier brings guests into an intimate chef-led world of smoked meat, preserving techniques, fire cooking, private feasts, and thoughtful culinary consulting. Every gathering is designed to feel personal, handcrafted, and memorable.

featuredExperiences.title: Featured Experiences
featuredExperiences.text: Hands-on workshops, slow-smoked specialties, private feasts, and consulting shaped by Chef Ofer Aviv.

aboutPreview.title: About Chef Ofer
aboutPreview.body1: Chef Ofer Aviv brings around 15 years of culinary experience to an atelier built on smoke, live fire, restaurant craft, and global fusion cuisine. His work is refined but never distant: every table is an invitation into story, technique, generosity, and connection.
aboutPreview.body2: For Ofer, dining is not only the serving of food. It is the ritual of gathering, the memory carried by aroma, and the rare pleasure of being hosted with intention.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.text: A visual taste of Chef Ofer, smoked meat, workshops, fire cooking, guests dining, and food closeups.

items.alt: Outdoor fire cooking class in Chiang Mai

items.quote: A beautifully personal evening. The food was generous, smoky, and full of detail, but the real magic was the story behind every dish.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.quote: Chef Ofer makes fire cooking feel both refined and deeply human. We left full, inspired, and already planning another visit.
items.name: Maya R.

items.quote: The workshop was hands-on without feeling rushed. It felt like being invited into a serious chef's private atelier.
items.name: James & Claire

faq.title: FAQ
faq.text: The essentials before booking a workshop, feast, private event, or consulting conversation.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer: Ofer's Atelier is located in Chai Sathan, Saraphi, Chiang Mai, Thailand.

items.question: How do I book?
items.answer: The fastest way is to send Ofer a WhatsApp message with your preferred experience, date, group size, and any dietary notes.

items.question: Are private groups available?
items.answer: Yes. Private chef-table dinners, fire cooking gatherings, and workshop formats can be arranged for small groups.

items.question: Do you offer consulting?
items.answer: Yes. Ofer provides restaurant consulting for menu direction, smoked meat programs, kitchen operations, and hospitality concepts.

items.question: Are beginners welcome?
items.answer: Absolutely. Workshops are chef-led and approachable, while still offering depth for experienced cooks.

items.question: What is included in the experience?
items.answer: Each experience includes chef instruction or hosting, prepared food, shared dining, and the relevant hands-on elements for the chosen format.

items.question: What languages are available?
items.answer: Experiences are available in English and Hebrew. Additional language support may be discussed when booking.

items.question: Do I need to pay deposit?
items.answer: A deposit may be requested to secure private dates or limited workshop seats. Ofer will confirm details during booking.

contact.title: Contact / Booking
contact.text: For availability, private groups, consulting, or workshop seats, send Ofer a WhatsApp message with your preferred date and experience.
contact.locationText: A private atelier on the outskirts of Chiang Mai, nestled in a quiet neighbourhood away from the tourist circuit. Exact directions sent on booking confirmation.

journal.title: Journal
journal.text: Notes on smoke, fire, preserving, hospitality, and restaurant craft.

items.title: Why Smoke Is More Than Flavor
items.excerpt: A chef's reflection on patience, heat, hardwood, and the quiet discipline behind memorable smoked meat.

items.title: Preserving as Culinary Memory
items.excerpt: Curing and preserving are not shortcuts. They are ways of concentrating time, place, and intention.

items.title: Building a Menu Around Fire
items.excerpt: How live fire can shape restaurant identity, kitchen rhythm, and a guest's emotional memory of a meal.

about.heroText: A chef, host, and culinary consultant with around 15 years of experience shaping memorable food around fire, smoke, and conversation.
about.sectionTitle: Craft, hospitality, and the pleasure of gathering
about.body1: Ofer Aviv is a chef with around 15 years of experience across the culinary field. His specialties include smoked meat, restaurant consulting, global fusion cuisine, and food experiences that bring guests close to the process.
about.body2: At Ofer's Atelier, dining is treated as an act of hosting: fire becomes atmosphere, smoke becomes memory, and the table becomes a place for stories, technique, generosity, and human connection.
about.metaDescription: Meet Chef Ofer Aviv, the chef behind Ofer's Atelier in Chiang Mai, specializing in smoked meat, fire cooking, restaurant consulting, and global fusion cuisine.

consulting.heroText: Restaurant consulting for operators who want sharper culinary identity, better systems, and a memorable guest experience.
consulting.sectionTitle: Restaurant consulting with a chef's eye
consulting.sectionText: For restaurants, hospitality teams, and culinary operators who need sharper food direction and a stronger guest experience.
services: Smoked meat and live-fire program design
consulting.metaDescription: Chef Ofer Aviv offers restaurant consulting in Thailand for menus, smoked meat programs, fire cooking concepts, operations, and guest experience.

privateEvents.heroText: Bespoke chef-led gatherings for guests who want a private table, live fire, smoked meat, and a meal built around connection.
privateEvents.body: Ofer designs intimate chef-table dinners, outdoor fire feasts, and workshop-led celebrations for private groups. The format can be shaped around smoked meat, global fusion courses, hands-on cooking, or a relaxed shared feast.
privateEvents.metaDescription: Book private chef-table dinners, fire cooking feasts, and intimate culinary gatherings with Chef Ofer Aviv in Chiang Mai.
